subject: A winged stag soaring through a night sky — a fantastical deer-bird creature with large feathered wings and prominent antlers
description: A large creature with the body of a stag and the broad feathered wings of a bird rises into a dark night sky. Its antlers are wide and pale, curving upward dramatically. The wings are rendered in warm golden-tan tones with fine feather detail, spread wide as the creature ascends. Below, a dark treeline is barely visible. Rays of pale light streak upward from below, suggesting the creature is ascending toward or away from a light source. The mood is majestic and otherworldly.
foreground: Winged stag in flight with spread wings and antlers
background: Dark night sky; faint treeline; pale ascending light rays
